name: Motorcycle Holdings Limited
analysis: MTO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.5100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5900, stop A$1.9899, target A$2.8860 (0.49:1) — then trail it.
